description: A document used to file or process a claim for unemployment insurance benefits.

first_name.instruction: First name of the unemployment claimant.

claimant_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

claimant_state.instruction: State of the claimant. Two-letter code.

gross_benefit_amount.instruction: Gross benefit amount. Necessary to collect if there are overpayments on another program, e.g., withholdings for child support.

total_compensation_paid.instruction: Total unemployment compensation paid for the period.

benefit_year_start.instruction: Start of benefit year. YYYY-MM-DD format.

benefit_year_end.instruction: End of benefit year. YYYY-MM-DD format.

issuing_agency.instruction: Name of issuing agency (e.g., MD Department of Labor, Beacon).

letter_date.instruction: Date the letter was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.

employer_name.instruction: The name of the claimant's most recent employer.

employer_address.instruction: The address of the claimant's most recent employer.

employment_start_date.instruction: The date the claimant started working for the employer. YYYY-MM-DD format.

employment_end_date.instruction: The date the claimant stopped working for the employer. YYYY-MM-DD format.

job_title.instruction: The job title or position held by the claimant.

reason_for_separation.instruction: The reason the claimant is no longer employed such as layoff, termination, resignation, or reduction in hours.
